title: French-Inspired Songpyeon Rice Bowl
description: A unique fusion of French and Korean flavors in a simple rice bowl dish, incorporating the traditional Korean songpyeon rice cake.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add Korean chili flakes and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add cooked fluffy rice to the skillet and stir to combine with chili flakes.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add songpyeon rice cakes to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped parsley.
